description: Evaluates a custom boolean expression on outcome values. Used as a predicate inside event(). The expression string supports operators: and, or, not, mod. Variables x, y, z, w refer to outcome positions 1-4 respectively. The special variable 'values' is an array of all numeric outcome values.

arguments.name: expression
arguments.description: Boolean expression using x, y, z, w and operators (and, or, not, mod, <, >, <=, >=, ==)

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
E = event(S, filter("(x + y) mod 2 == 0"), fc(steelblue))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
E = event(S, filter("x > 3 and y > 3"), fc(coral))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
E = event(S, filter("x == 6 or y == 6"), fc(gold))
